name: Beaumont Inn Bread Pudding with Bourbon Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb French style bread (the firmer the better)
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear bread into medium pieces.
2. Add sugar and cinnamon to the bread.
3. In a separate bowl, mix milk, lightly beaten eggs, and vanilla.
4. Combine the milk mixture with the bread mixture.
5. Place half of the batter in a casserole dish.
6. Layer pecans and raisins (if using) on top.
7. Pour the remaining batter over the layers.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Serve warm with Bourbon sauce.
